mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS property_id, p.name, p.property_type, p.sgg_cd, p.umd_nm, ( SELECT sd.deal_amount FROM sale_deal sd WHERE sd.property_id = p.id ORDER BY sd.deal_date DESC, sd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_sale_price, ( SELECT rd.deposit FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id AND rd.monthly_rent = 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_jeonse_deposit, ( SELECT rd.deposit FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_monthly_rent_deposit, ( SELECT rd.monthly_rent FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_monthly_rent, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sale_deal sd WHERE sd.property_id = p.id AND sd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS sale_deal_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id AND rd.monthly_rent = 0 AND rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS jeonse_deal_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 AND rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS monthly_rent_deal_count FROM favorite_property fp JOIN property p ON p.id = fp.property_id WHERE fp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fp.created_at DESC, fp.id DESC
